debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

proof:
have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
    have h := @reduce₂ p _ _ _ (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
    simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h
    by_contra h'; simp [h'] at h
  simp [this, sub_eq_zero, h.symm]
failed_attempts: simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h_eval, h]

exact h_fold args.toArray.toList (Exp.c 0)
  · rfl

have h_ev : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
    have h1 := reduce₂ (e := Exp.c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) rfl
    simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h1
    split at h1; exact sub_eq_zero.mp ‹_›; contradiction
  simp [h_ev, h, sub_eq_zero]
simp [h_eq, sub_eq_zero, h.symm]

have h_eval : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    have h_red := @reduce₂ p _ w args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
    unfold Cs.eval at h_red; simp [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h_red
    split_ifs at h_red; assumption; contradiction
  simp [h_eval, h, sub_eq_zero]

have h1 := reduce₂ (e := .c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) (by simp [Exp.eval])
      unfold Cs.eval at h1; split_ifs at h1; exact sub_eq_zero.mp ‹_›; contradiction
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    rw [h_eval] at h_eq
    exact (h h_eq.symm).elim
  · rfl

split at h_red; assumption; contradiction
  unfold Cs.eval; simp [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero, h_bits, h]

have h_eq : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
    have h_red := @reduce₂ p _ w args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
    simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h_red
    split_ifs at h_red with h_cond
    · exact sub_eq_zero.mp h_cond
    · contradiction
  simp [h_eq, h, sub_eq_zero]

split_ifs with h_eval
  · have h_eq : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      have h_red := reduce₂ (e := Exp.c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) (by simp [Exp.eval])
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h_red
      split_ifs at h_red with h_red_eq
      · exact sub_eq_zero.mp h_red_eq
      · contradiction
    exact (h ((sub_eq_zero.mp h_eval).symm.trans h_eq)).elim
  · rfl

have h_eval : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    have h_red := reduce₂ (e := .c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) rfl
    simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h_red
    split at h_red
    · assumption
    · contradiction
  simp [sub_eq_zero, h_eval, h]

have h_e : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    generalize h_v : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
    induction w generalizing v with
    | zero =>
      have : args = ⟨#[], by rfl⟩ := by simp
      simp [this, Exp.eval]
    | succ w ih =>
      have h_v : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext i hi; match i with | 0 => simp | i+1 => simp [add_comm]
      rw [h_v]; simp [Exp.eval, ih]
  simp [h_e, h, sub_eq_zero]

split_ifs with h_eq
  · exfalso
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    apply h
    rw [←h_eq]
    have h_fold : ∀ (l : List (ZMod p)) (acc_e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
        (l.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) acc_e).eval =
        l.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc_e.eval := by
      intro l; induction l with
      | nil => intro; simp [Exp.eval]
      | cons x xs ih => intro; simp [Exp.eval, ih]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    simp [Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, h_fold]
  · rfl
simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h_eq, sub_eq_zero, h, h.symm]

split_ifs with h_eq
  · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    have h_eval : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
      generalize h_ve : Exp.c 0 = v_e
      generalize h_vv : (0 : ZMod p) = v_v
      have hv : v_e.eval = v_v := by simp [h_ve, h_vv, Exp.eval]
      revert v_e v_v args
      induction w with
      | zero => intros args v_e v_v hv; have : args = #v[] := by simp; simp [this, hv]
      | succ w ih =>
        intros args v_e v_v hv
        have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          ext i; cases i <;> simp [Vector.insertIdx_zero, add_comm]
        rw [h_args]; simp [Exp.eval]; apply ih; simp [hv, Exp.eval]
    rw [h_eval] at h_eq
    contradiction
  · rfl

exact h (h_eq.symm.trans h').symm
  · rfl

split_ifs with h'
  · have : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      simp [bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
      generalize (Exp.c 0) = a
      induction args.toArray.toList generalizing a <;> simp [Exp.eval, *]
    rw [this, sub_eq_zero] at h'
    contradiction
  · rfl
simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h_ev, h, sub_eq_zero]

split_ifs with h'
  · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h'
    have : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
      generalize h_v : (0 : ZMod p) = v
      generalize h_ev : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = ev
      have h_evv : ev.eval = v := by simp [h_ev, h_v, Exp.eval]
      induction args.toArray.toList generalizing v ev with
      | nil => exact h_evv
      | cons b bs ih => apply ih; simp [Exp.eval, h_evv]
    rw [this] at h'
    exact (h h'.symm).elim
  · rfl

split_ifs with h_eq
  · have h_eval : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      have h_red := reduce₂ (e := Exp.c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) rfl
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h_red
      split_ifs at h_red with h_red_eq
      · exact sub_eq_zero.mp h_red_eq
      · contradiction
    rw [h_eval, sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    contradiction
  · rfl

split_ifs with h'
  · have h_eq := reduce₂ (e := Exp.c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) rfl
    simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    split_ifs at h_eq with h_eq'
    · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h'; exact (h (h_eq' ▸ h').symm).elim
    · contradiction
  · rfl

split_ifs with h'
  · have h_eval : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
      rw [Array.foldl_hom Exp.eval]
      · rfl
      · intros; simp [Exp.eval]
    rw [h_eval, sub_eq_zero] at h'
    exact (h h'.symm).elim
  · rfl

split_ifs with h_eq
  · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
      generalize (Exp.c 0 : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) = v
      have : Exp.eval v = 0 := by simp [Exp.eval]
      revert v; induction args.toArray.toList <;> intros <;> simp [Exp.eval, List.foldl_toArray', *]
    rw [this] at h_eq; contradiction
  · rfl
simp [Cs.eval, h_id, h, h.symm, sub_eq_zero]

simpa [Cs.eval, sub_eq_zero] using reduce₂ (e := .c (bits2num args)) (cs := .nil) rfl
    simp [h_eq, sub_eq_zero] at h'
    exact (h h'.symm).elim
  · rfl

split_ifs with h_eq
  · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    have h_eval : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num
      generalize h_v : (Exp.c 0 : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) = v
      revert v; induction w with
      | zero => intro v; have : args = #v[] := by simp; simp [this, Vector.foldl, Exp.eval]
      | succ w ih =>
        intro v; have h_a : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext i; match i with | 0 => simp | i+1 => simp [add_comm]
        rw [h_a]; unfold Vector.foldl; simp [ih, Exp.eval, add_comm]
    rw [h_eval] at h_eq
    contradiction
  · rfl

split_ifs with h'
  · have h_eq : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      have h_red := @reduce₂ p _ w args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
      unfold Cs.eval at h_red
      simp [Exp.eval] at h_red
      split_ifs at h_red with h''
      · exact sub_eq_zero.mp h''
      · contradiction
    rw [h_eq, sub_eq_zero] at h'
    exact (h h'.symm).elim
  · rfl
simp [Cs.eval, h_eval, h, sub_eq_zero]

split_ifs with h_eq
  · have : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      have h_red := @reduce₂ p _ w args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h_red
      split_ifs at h_red; assumption; contradiction
    exact (h (this ▸ h_eq).symm).elim
  · rfl

split_ifs with h_eq
  · exfalso
    have h_eval : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      have h_red := @reduce₂ p _ _ args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h_red
      split_ifs at h_red; exact sub_eq_zero.mp ‹_›; contradiction
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    rw [h_eval] at h_eq
    exact h h_eq.symm
  · rfl

induction v using Vector.inductionOn generalizing e_i <;> simp [Vector.foldl_cons, *, Exp.eval]
    exact (h (h_ev args (Exp.c 0) ▸ h').symm).elim
  · rfl

split_ifs with h_eq
  · exfalso; apply h; rw [← h_eq]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    rw [Vector.foldl_hom Exp.eval]
    · rfl
    · intros; simp [Exp.eval]
  · rfl
successful_attempts:
have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
    have h := @reduce₂ p _ _ _ (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil rfl
    simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h
    by_contra h'; simp [h'] at h
  simp [this, sub_eq_zero, h.symm]
